test-code.description: Public modifier is not necessary on a test method nor on the class
Package private modifiers are what is required
Private method modifiers should be reported by rule 'JUnit5TestNoPrivateModifier' and ignored by rule 'JUnit5TestShouldBePackagePrivate'
Private modifiers for inner classes should be reported by rule 'JUnit5TestNoPrivateModifier' and ignored by rule 'JUnit5TestShouldBePackagePrivate'
Public modifier is allowed on an abstract test classes
Public modifier is allowed on test interfaces
Public and protected modifiers on all JUnit5 test types should be rejected
Public JUnit4 tests are not flagged
test class should have default visibility, even if the test methods are in a parent class
test-code.code:
import net.sourceforge.pmd.lang.java.rule.errorprone.rulesfortests.Junit5ParentWithTest;
public class Child extends Junit5ParentWithTest {}

test-code.description: test class should have default visibility, even if the test methods are in a nested class inside a parent class #6736
test-code.code:
import net.sourceforge.pmd.lang.java.rule.errorprone.rulesfortests.JUnit5ParentWithNestedTestClass;
public class FooTest extends JUnit5ParentWithNestedTestClass {}
